intro: CrisisMap helps humanitarian teams capture, store, and export damage assessments for crisis response.
admin-login: Admins authenticate securely to manage crises and protect sensitive assessment data.
create-crisis: Create an active crisis with location and form templates so field teams know what to document.
user-report: Field users capture structured damage information — severity, building type, location, and photos — without an account.
dashboard: Validated reports appear on the live crisis map for real-time situational awareness.
history: Repeat assessments at the same building are versioned, tracking how damage changes over time.
export: UNDP and humanitarian partners export structured data as CSV, GeoJSON, or Shapefile for coordination and analysis.
offline: Without connectivity, reports save privately on the device and sync automatically once back online.
